name: Feature request

title: "[Feature] "

---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Is it related to a limitation you've run into?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — mockups, references to similar features in other plugins, etc.
